hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains only the thinking/planning process and no actual clinical note was produced. There is no clinical content to evaluate, but the output itself is a complete failure to generate the note.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and does not contain a completed clinical note. The instruction to 'Return ONLY the completed note' was completely violated.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was generated, so no transcript content was captured in a structured note format.
missed_items: All transcript content - no note was produced

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was output. The entire output is an internal reasoning/thinking process with no template-based sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted because no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive loops of the same reasoning steps duplicated dozens of times.
